sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, text_column VARCHAR(255), num_column INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column, num_column) VALUES (1, 'test string for testing', 10), (2, NULL, 20), (3, 'another test', 15), (4, 'es', 0);
SELECT id, instr(text_column, 'test') | num_column as combined_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, text_column, instr(text_column, 'test') AS pos FROM test_table WHERE instr(text_column, 'test') | 0 > 0;
SELECT id, text_column FROM test_table WHERE instr(text_column, 'not_found') | num_column IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE second_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, parent_id INTEGER, value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO second_table (id, parent_id, value) VALUES (1, 1, 5), (2, 1, NULL), (3, 2, 10);
SELECT t1.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM second_table t2 WHERE t2.parent_id = t1.id) | instr(t1.text_column, 'test') as total FROM test_table t1;
SELECT id, text_column FROM test_table WHERE instr(text_column, 'test') > 0 HAVING (instr(text_column, 'another') | num_column) > 0;
SELECT t1.id, t2.value | instr(t1.text_column, 'test') AS calculated_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN second_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.parent_id;
SELECT id, instr(text_column, 'test string') + (num_column | 1) AS calculated_column FROM test_table WHERE text_column IS NOT NULL;
